title: Retro Vinyl Music Culture Poster AI
sourceTitle: Retro Vinyl Music Culture Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Retro vinyl music culture poster for specific record or artist mood variant with readable visual details, with headline 有些旋律，会陪你很多年。 and title BLUE HOUR. Subject: A spinning vinyl record becomes the central hero visual, surrounded by warm lamp glow, old audio equipment, wood interior texture, and the nostalgic mood of specific record or artist mood variant with readable visual details. Scene: Vintage listening-room or record-cover environment with old speakers, turntable details, wooden walls, warm air, film grain, and a nostalgic analog music atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 4:5 poster layout: large central vinyl record in motion, top title area, warm audio-room background, cinematic depth, and balanced typography like a vintage record cover. Signature Elements: Spinning vinyl record, specific record or artist mood variant with readable visual details, old speakers, wood room, warm lamp glow, film grain, deep coffee-orange-black-gold palette, 有些旋律，会陪你很多年。, and BLUE HOUR. Style: Retro music poster, vinyl record aesthetic, vintage editorial design, 1970s music-poster typography, premium analog photography, music-culture branding, and cinematic film texture. Color Palette: Deep coffee brown, retro orange, black-gold tones, warm amber highlights, shadowed wood neutrals, and subtle film-grain contrast. Lighting: Warm low lamp light reflecting across the vinyl grooves, soft background glow around speakers and wood, and nostalgic smoky atmosphere without harsh modern lighting. Camera: Close poster-grade record-photography angle with the spinning vinyl dominant, old audio equipment readable in the background, and record-cover-style framing. Typography: 有些旋律，会陪你很多年。 appears as the main readable Chinese poster line; BLUE HOUR appears as the bold retro music title or subtitle, using thick vintage type. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
